candidates.title: First Stock Purchase
candidates.description: Purchased first stock at age 11, buying Cities Service Preferred shares

evidence.snippet: Buffett bought his first stock at age 11

candidates.title: Founded Buffett Partnership Ltd
candidates.description: Established investment partnership in Omaha, Nebraska

evidence.snippet: In 1956, Buffett founded Buffett Partnership Ltd

candidates.title: Acquired Berkshire Hathaway
candidates.description: Began acquiring shares of Berkshire Hathaway textile company

evidence.snippet: Buffett began buying shares of Berkshire Hathaway in 1962

candidates.title: Became Billionaire
candidates.description: Net worth exceeded $1 billion, entering Forbes 400 list

evidence.snippet: became a billionaire when Berkshire Hathaway began selling class A shares

candidates.title: The Giving Pledge
candidates.description: Pledged to give away 99% of fortune to philanthropic causes

evidence.snippet: announced intention to give away 99% of his wealth to charity
